languages.text: Украшенное изящной резьбой оружие странной формы было создано явно руками ксеносов.

traits.locale_text: Украшенное изящной резьбой оружие странной формы было создано явно руками ксеносов.

languages.text: This strangely shaped weapon, decorated with exquisite carvings, is clearly the work of xenos hands.
languages.original_text: Украшенное изящной резьбой оружие странной формы было создано явно руками ксеносов.

traits.locale_text: This strangely shaped weapon, decorated with exquisite carvings, is clearly the work of xenos hands.
This strangely shaped weapon, decorated with exquisite carvings, is clearly the work of xenos hands.
This strangely shaped weapon, decorated with exquisite carvings, is clearly the work of xenos hands.

languages.text: Esta extraña arma, decorada con tallas exquisitas, es indudablemente obra de xenos.
languages.original_text: This strangely shaped weapon, decorated with exquisite carvings, is clearly the work of xenos hands.

traits.locale_text: Esta extraña arma, decorada con tallas exquisitas, es indudablemente obra de xenos.

languages.text: 这件造型奇特、雕刻精美的武器，显然出自异形之手。
languages.original_text: This strangely shaped weapon, decorated with exquisite carvings, is clearly the work of xenos hands.

traits.locale_text: 这件造型奇特、雕刻精美的武器，显然出自异形之手。

languages.text: Ornée de gravures magnifiquement ciselées, cette arme à la forme étrange est de toute évidence de facture xénos.
languages.original_text: This strangely shaped weapon, decorated with exquisite carvings, is clearly the work of xenos hands.

traits.locale_text: Ornée de gravures magnifiquement ciselées, cette arme à la forme étrange est de toute évidence de facture xénos.

languages.text: Zarif oymalarla süslenmiş olan bu garip şekilli silah, açıkça zeno ellerinden çıkma bir eser.
languages.original_text: This strangely shaped weapon, decorated with exquisite carvings, is clearly the work of xenos hands.

traits.locale_text: Zarif oymalarla süslenmiş olan bu garip şekilli silah, açıkça zeno ellerinden çıkma bir eser.

languages.text: この奇妙な形の武器は、精巧な彫刻が施されており、明らかに異形の者の手によるものである。
languages.original_text: This strangely shaped weapon, decorated with exquisite carvings, is clearly the work of xenos hands.

traits.locale_text: この奇妙な形の武器は、精巧な彫刻が施されており、明らかに異形の者の手によるものである。

languages.text: Diese seltsam geformte Waffe ist mit erlesenen Gravuren versehen und eindeutig das Werk von Xenos.
languages.original_text: This strangely shaped weapon, decorated with exquisite carvings, is clearly the work of xenos hands.

traits.locale_text: Diese seltsam geformte Waffe ist mit erlesenen Gravuren versehen und eindeutig das Werk von Xenos.
